name: Gmail Assistant
description: Gmail API integration with smart AI features — read, send, search, and manage emails with Claude-powered summarization and drafting. Powered by evolink.ai
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: When AI features (ai-summary, ai-reply, ai-prioritize) are used, email subject, sender, and body content are sent to api.evolink.ai for processing. No data is stored by EvoLink after the response is returned. AI features are optional and require explicit opt-in via EVOLINK_API_KEY.
